headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Seagate (STX) After Its 7x One-Year Share Price Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Seagate Technology Holdings at US$847.47 is still priced attractively after a huge run, the key question is what you are actually paying for today. The stock has pulled back about 3.7% over the last week, yet is still up 7.8% over 30 days, 194.7% year to date and more than 7x over the past year. This naturally raises questions about how much optimism is already in the price. Recent coverage has focused on Seagate as a beneficiary of growing data storage needs and...

headline: MACOM, FormFactor, and Seagate Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the AVGO earnings overhang and the stronger-than-expected jobs report combined to drive one of the broadest global chip selloff of the year.
